programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how rocks have influenced the architecture of the Mediterranean, from the pyramids of Egypt to the squares of ancient Greece.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Tracing the history of cave paintings.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart examines how the rocks beneath our feet played a crucial role in determining the beliefs of ancient civilisations.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts visits the Arabian Desert to find clues as to how a tiny group left the African continent around 70,000 years ago.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Göbeklitepe ruins discovered in Turkey's history goes back 12,000 years. How and in what way did the descendants of the Neanderthals, the Aztecs of Europe, disappear with the arrival of Homo sapiens?

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Body in the Bog
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Body in the Bog
programme.desc: Veteran archaeologist Ned Kelly and a team of scientists investigate the find of a mummified body in the boglands of Cashel, Ireland.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: The explorers find themselves trapped on the plateau high above the Amazon jungle, surrounded by prehistoric horrors.

programme.title: Pluto TV Verdenskrigene
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.sub-title: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia
programme.desc: Monty’s journey sees him follow the path 33 SAS soldiers took after they were parachuted behind enemy lines to attack the enemy and create chaos to draw Nazi-fascist forces away from the front line.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 ble verden ført inn i atomalderen. Rollen hans som "Father of the Bomb" var satt , og Oppenheimer ble stadig mer bekymret for den potensielle faren denne vitenskapelige oppfinnelser kunne utgjøre for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler
programme.sub-title: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler
programme.desc: In Hitler’s Germany, those with Jewish ancestry faced harsh Nuremberg Laws. Full Jews faced death; Mischlinge endured discrimination, job bans. Some, like Helmut Schmidt, unaware of heritage, found protectors like Milch in high places.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: The German invasion of Russia from Operation Barbarossa on 22 June 1941 to Kursk on 5 July 1943.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: The German invasion of Russia from Operation Barbarossa on 22 June 1941 to Kursk on 5 July 1943.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Surprising Beginnings
programme.desc: Tyske kommandører oppdager effektiviteten i å gasse fanger, og Auschwitz forvandles fra en liten bakgårdsleir for de som motarbeider den nazistiske okkupasjonen av Polen, til en storstilt utryddelsesleir for jøder.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Surprising Beginnings
programme.desc: Tyske kommandører oppdager effektiviteten i å gasse fanger, og Auschwitz forvandles fra en liten bakgårdsleir for de som motarbeider den nazistiske okkupasjonen av Polen, til en storstilt utryddelsesleir for jøder.

programme.title: Secret War: Christine Granville

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Overlord
programme.desc: After a careful campaign of disinformation that throws the German defenders off-guard, the Western Allies finally land on Normandy.France is liberated.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Nazis Outfought
programme.desc: By 1944, Hitler's image as a victorious leader is crumbling. He faces a bomb plot led by Stauffenberg and Tresckow, intending to kill him and overthrow the regime. Hitler survives the bombing, triggering a brutal reprisal against conspirators.

programme.title: Secret War: The French Triple Agent
programme.desc: Operation Cockade, led by MI6's double agent Henri Dericourt in 1943, aimed to deceive Germans with sabotage. Despite efforts, Germans withdrew divisions unconvinced. Dericourt faced a post-war treason trial and died in a mysterious 1962 plane crash.

programme.title: Secret War: Christine Granville

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Island War
programme.desc: The Marines succeed in the "island hopping" strategy against suicidal resistance. The US Navy establishes supremacy, cutting off Japan.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.desc: Fler människor dödas 1944 än någonsin tidigare på Auschwitz. Nazisterna försöker skapa förvirring bland de allierade i öst, och de västallierade fattar beslut om att förhandla med nazisterna om judarna och bomba lägret.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: 1945 befriar Röda armén Auschwitz-Birkenau. När andra befrielseaktioner sker de följande månaderna, chockas världen. De överlevande judarna möter fasor när de försöker återvända till sina liv, och få SS-män hittas och ställs inför rätta.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due

programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Secret War: Agent Garbo
programme.desc: Juan Pujol, MI6's WWII agent "Garbo," created a fictitious spy network in Lisbon, deceiving the Germans with crucial disinformation and influencing their strategies. After the war, MI6 protected him, and he lived in Venezuela until his death in 1988.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Una vez más, Bluto y Popeye compiten ferozmente entre ellos. Mientras que los Bruisers de Bluto toman la delantera en un duro juego de fútbol americano con los Pouncers de Popeye.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Bluto y Popeye están juntos en una discusión porque Bluto no le devolverá la pelota a Popeye. Su disputa interrumpe la clase de ballet de Olivia Olivo e insiste en que ambos permanecen en su clase como bailarines.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.sub-title: El baluarte del condado de Yucon
programme.desc: Popeye y Bluto se ofrecen como voluntarios para proteger la nómina y hacer un deber especial para el general que resulta ser el que tiene que herrar a todos los caballos.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Olivia Olivo son socios que conducen un camión a campo traviesa. Bluto cree que le iría mucho mejor con su negocio de camiones si tuviera a Olivia como compañera, así que trata de convencerla.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Olivias quiere que Popeye le muestre cuánto se preocupa por ella, por lo que Popeye decide construir un monumento dedicado a los dos. Pero Bluto también quiere impresionar a Olivia y comienza a interferir con el trabajo de Popeye.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: El tío de Popeye, Angus McPopeye, ha pedido su ayuda porque el granjero Bluto está robando todo de su granja. Popeye y sus sobrinos intentan ayudar al tío Angus, pero Bluto no dejará de robar los cultivos.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Un día, mientras limpiaba la primavera, el loro de Olivia Polly escapa accidentalmente. Olivia inmediatamente llama a Popeye para que la ayude, a quien, por supuesto, le sigue Bluto, que también quiere ayudar.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye intenta devolver una mula a la base militar de la que vino. Después de pasar por una gran cantidad de problemas, a Popeye se le dice que devuelva la mula de donde vino porque la mula había sido dada de baja honorablemente del ejército.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Olivia planean construir el edificio más alto del mundo, pero Bluto interfiere con sus planes porque quiere hacer lo mismo.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Olivia navegan a una isla en un viaje, sin saber que Bluto tiene una casa allí. Después de aterrizar en la isla, se enteran de que Bluto planea "darles cazaría".

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Bluto compiten entre sí en una carrera en todo el país para ganar un trabajo como camionero para la Compañía de camiones Eight Ball Trucking. Popeye logra vencer a Bluto que se queda sin "gasolina".

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Olivia están montando un "circo acuático" con focas y delfines entrenados y otras criaturas marinas.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.sub-title: Te lo llevas o te lo tragas
programme.desc: Popeye aparece en un popular programa de juegos llamado "Tómalo o Arruinarlo", sin embargo, Bluto lo manipula para que Popeye no pueda responder todas las preguntas correctamente y gana premios terribles.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.sub-title: Un mal día en la Panadería
programme.desc: Olivia Olivo abre una panadería en una sección destartalada de la ciudad y recibe el premio "Ciudadana del año" por sus servicios para mejorar la comunidad.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Bluto son contratados para pintar por una empresa de juguetes que les dice que quien haga el mejor trabajo gana un gran contrato.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Cocoliso entra en un desfile como un "hombre fuerte", sin embargo, causa estragos y preocupación para Popeye y Olivia cuando se aleja para perseguir un globo.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye ha entrado en una carrera de botes por el Mississippi a Nueva Orleans. Su bote se llama "La Reina de Espinacas" y Olivia Olivo también está a bordo para entretener a los pasajeros.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye y Olivia Olivo intentan decidir qué vestuario usar para el Carnaval. Bluto, vestido primero como un mono y luego como un caballero, engaña a Olivia Olivo haciéndole creer que es Popeye disfrazado.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Bluto es el malvado alguacil de Rottenham que recauda fuertes impuestos de los campesinos pobres del bosque de Sherwood. Popeye Hood y sus hombres de verde espinaca devuelven el dinero y se lo dan a los campesinos.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Olivia Olivo lleva a los niños a acampar en Spinachvine Creek, mientras Popeye y Eugene van a la cabaña de montaña de su tía para un merecido descanso.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Olivia Olivo ha abierto un spa de salud y Popeye y Bluto están solicitando el puesto de instructor. Olivia los prueba en la máquina flex-o-cizer, las pesas, la máquina de correr eléctrica y las colchonetas.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Bluto rescata a un naufragado Popeye y a Olivia Olivo, pero quiere deshacerse de Popeye y navegar con Olivia. Lanza a Popeye por la borda y trata de sacarlo del nido del cuervo.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye, ante la insistencia de Olivia Olivo, decide tomar una clase de ejercicio para poder ser fuerte sin espinacas, solo para descubrir que Bluto es el instructor.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Pappy y Bluto persiguen a la misma mujer en un crucero por el océano. Intentan superar al otro para ganarla; Pappy porque se ha enamorado y Bluto porque ella es rica.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Popeye le cuenta a Cocoliso un cuento antes de dormir donde el héroe es "Popeye de la Selva". Bwana Bluto es un cazador que se encuentra con Popeye de la Selva y su compañero Olivia Selva.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Es el final de la novena entrada, el equipo local está abajo 49-0, Olivia Olivo se adelanta al bate y Bluto está lanzando. Ella se poncha. Cocoliso es el siguiente y también se poncha. Popeye, último bateador, debe salvar el día.

programme.title: All new Popeye
programme.desc: Olivo es una DJ en WOIL y Popeye es el reportero de tráfico móvil. Bluto es un reportero de WBLU y está decidido a cerrar WOIL.

programme.desc: Pilón es juez en un concurso de caballos. Popeye, Olivia y Bluto son concursantes. Cocoliso también quiere participar en la acción, pero es ignorado.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleashed 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Secret War: The Special Interrogation Group
programme.desc: The SIG consisted of German speaking Jewish volunteers from Palestine. They had a highly dangerous job: which was to pose as Germans behind enemy lines and extract intelligence and do acts of sabotage. Few had a long-life expectancy.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.sub-title: Hitler and I: Reflections on Evil
programme.desc: An in-depth, behind-the-scenes exploration of the making of the miniseries "Hitler: The Rise of Evil."

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Host Wil Willis tests the Garand against the Arisaka Type 99, showcasing its impact in WWII and sniper rifles' deadly precision, from Carlos Hathcock to Craig Harrison. Witness the historic rifles that shaped warfare!

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Misfits Gather
programme.desc: Hitler finds his political destiny in post-war Munich. He quickly dominates a fringe party & builds it into the Nazi Party. He recruits infamous men to the cause including Herman Goering & Heinrich Himmler & they plot a coup known as the Beerhall Putsch.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: The German invasion of Russia from Operation Barbarossa on 22 June 1941 to Kursk on 5 July 1943.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Arajs Kommando
programme.desc: Viktor Arajs, a Latvian, played a significant role in the Holocaust, collaborating with the Nazis to eliminate Jews. Leading the Arajs Kommando, he orchestrated the killings of around 30,000 Jews. Arajs justified his actions as patriotic defense.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 blev verden ført ind i atomalderen. Da hans rolle som bombens fader var blevet cementeret, blev Oppenheimer mere og mere bekymret over den potentielle fare, som videnskabelige opfindelser kunne udgøre for menneskeheden.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 blev verden ført ind i atomalderen. Da hans rolle som bombens fader var blevet cementeret, blev Oppenheimer mere og mere bekymret over den potentielle fare, som videnskabelige opfindelser kunne udgøre for menneskeheden.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Secret War: The Mafia Connection
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano, a mafia boss of the 1930s, was in jail in 1942 on charges of running prostitution rings. US intelligence services did a deal with him and he got the Italians to share intelligence on German U boat movements.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: In Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's secret agenda is to rid Germany of Jews. By 1938, after creating work schemes and rearming, he orchestrates "The Night of Broken Glass," burning 1,000 synagogues and killing 91 Jews, preparing for further aggression.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: In Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's secret agenda is to rid Germany of Jews. By 1938, after creating work schemes and rearming, he orchestrates "The Night of Broken Glass," burning 1,000 synagogues and killing 91 Jews, preparing for further aggression.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The bots battling it out include Wheely Big Cheese, Suicidal Tendencies and Sir Killerlot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Killerhurtz, Destruct-a-Bubble, Splinter and Centurion are competing for a place in the semi-finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former holiday camp bluecoats enter the competition with their `launcher' Apollo. Father and-son-team Kan-Opener have a robot with huge piercing claws. A team of engineering students have created a future tech machine called Sweeney Todd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Featuring one of the most bizarre, but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on `Robot Wars', Gabriel, built by Mensa member Craig and his three sons. It has wheels as tall as a washing machine and a huge samurai sword.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam reist in das Jahr 1953 und springt in den Körper eines Toten: den Privatdetektiv Phil Grimsley. Als sein Partner Nick Allen erfährt, dass Phil von einem Mann namens Klapper getötet wurde, will er ihm auf die Schliche kommen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam Beckett kommt in Kalifornien im Jahr 1971 an. Er soll dort verhindern, dass Malerin Troian Claridge in zwei Tagen in einem See ertrinkt.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam hilft einer geschiedenen Mutter, deren kauziger Sohn einen fatalen Fehler macht, als er versucht, sich dem Gruppenzwang an der Schule zu beugen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam findet sich 1962 im Körper des Quarterbacks Eddie Vega wieder. Seine Mission ist es, seinen Teamkollegen Chuey davon abzuhalten, absichtlich das nächste Spiel zu verlieren, um den Miethai Ruben de Guerra zufriedenzustellen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: September 1973: FBI Agent Peter Langly - alias Sam - erhält die Aufgabe, Dana zu beschützen. Die junge Frau möchte gegen ihren ehemaligen Chef, den Drogenschmuggler Nick Kochifos, aussagen. Dieser hat sie schon zweimal ausfündig machen können.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: George erwacht 1970 im Körper von George Washakie. Er wurde mit Georges Grossvater ins Gefängnis gebracht, weil sie sich ein Auto "ausgeliehen" haben. Sie können allerdings aus dem Gefängnis fliehen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Die Leiche Hilla Danners liegt eines Tages vor dem Leichenbestatter Melvin Spooner, alias Sam. Er sieht anhand der Wunden im Gesicht, dass sie ermordet worden sein muss und beschließt, den Mörder ausfindet zu machen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam muss ins Jahr 1950 reisen, um in Chicago einen Billard-Spieler und seine Enkelin zu retten. Die Enkelin will aus dem Billardclub einen Blues Club machen und hat dafür einen Kredit aufgenommen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam schlüpft am 11. März 1963 in den Körper des Türstehers Buster. Der hat der Kollegin und Stripperin Bunny geholfen, ein Kind zu entführen. Sie hat vorher als Babysitterin auf das Kind aufgepasst.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam landet am 3. Juni 1954 im Körper des Globetrotters Phillip Dumont auf einem Kreuzfahrtschiff. Er muss an seiner Stelle versuchen, seine Ex-Frau Catherine zurückzugewinnen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam landet am 1. April 1969 in den Klamotten einer Prostituierten auf einer Straße. Als er unter Beschuss gerät kommt ihm Robert Skaggs zur Hilfe.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam erwacht im Jahre 1957 im Körper von "Captain Galaxy" alias Moe Stein. "Captain Galaxy" mimt den Clown in einer Kindersendung. Er ist sehr schusselig, weshalb er immer wieder bei Menschen aneckt. In seinem Keller baut er an einer Zeitmaschine.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam schlüpft in den Körper des Showtänzers Rod, um so die Tänzerin Diana zu retten. Diese ist in die Prostitution abgerutscht und hat sich mit HIV infiziert. Zuvor ist sie bei einem Vortanzen abgelehnt worden, weil sie taub ist.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Als Bar-Pianist lebt Sam gefährlich. Er und seine Verflossene geraten ins Visier eines Mörders.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam nimmt die Gestalt von Gilbert Hebert an, um den Mord an seiner Cousine Marsha zu verhindern. Die Prostituierte wurde in Heberts Freudenhaus ums Leben gebracht.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Am 12. April 1974 schlüpft Sam in den Körper von Sänger Geoffrey `Tonic' Mole. Er soll verhindern, dass der Leadsänger der Glitter Rock-Band "King Thunder" ermordet wird.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Am 12. April 1974 schlüpft Sam in den Körper von Sänger Geoffrey `Tonic' Mole. Er soll verhindern, dass der Leadsänger der Glitter Rock-Band "King Thunder" ermordet wird.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Die nächste Zeitreise führt Sam in das Jahr 1971 zurück, direkt auf den elektrischen Stuhl. Im Körper von Jesus Ortega wird er beschuldigt, einen Priester bei einem Banküberfall erschossen zu haben.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Die nächste Zeitreise führt Sam in das Jahr 1971 zurück, direkt auf den elektrischen Stuhl. Im Körper von Jesus Ortega wird er beschuldigt, einen Priester bei einem Banküberfall erschossen zu haben.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam reist ins Jahr 1955, wo er sich im Körper des Ringers Terry Sammins befindet. Zusammen mit seinem Bruder Ronnie will er um die Weltmeisterschaft kämpfen. Sam soll allerdings Ronnie vom Kampf abhalten, da dieser unter einem Herzfehler leidet.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
programme.desc: Sam reist in das Jahr 1962 zur Zeit der Kuba-Kirse und schlüpft in den Körper von Eddi Elroy. Dieser betreibt mit seinem Bruder Mac einen Handel mit Atombunkern. Sam, alias Eddi, soll Mac davon abhalten, seinen Nachbarn, Burt Rosecranes, umzubringen.

programme.title: Zurück in die Vergangenheit
